headline: POV Beauty Co-founders on turning TikTok followers into customers
summary: TikTok star Mikayla Nogueira and her POV Beauty Co-founder, Ani Hadjinian, sit down with Host Elizabeth Gore to break down how they built a fast-growing brand from scratch. They share insights on turning social media into a powerful sales engine, balancing creativity with business strategy, and building a partnership that fuels growth.

headline: Ulta names chief strategy, growth officer
summary: The beauty retailer promoted Kristin Wolf, who has worked at the company since 2019, to the C-suite position.
